zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzGerold於大約1215年出生在英國諾福爾可蒙德福德時，她的父親Henry FitzGerrold42歲，母親Ermentrude Talbot16歲。她於1239年與Robert de Lisle在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzGerold于大约1215年出生在英国諾福爾可蒙德福德时，她的父亲Henry FitzGerrold42岁，母亲Ermentrude Talbot16岁。她于1239年与Robert de Lisle在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzGerold was born about 1215, in Mundford, Norfolk, England, her father, Henry FitzGerrold, was 42 and her mother, Ermentrude Talbot, was 16. She married Robert de Lisle in 1239, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1284, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzGerold est née environ 1215, à Mundford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry FitzGerrold, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude Talbot, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Lisle en 1239, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1284, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzGerold um 1215 in Mundford, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry FitzGerrold 42 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude Talbot 16. Sie hat 1239 in England Robert de Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzGerold è nata il circa 1215 nel Mundford, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Henry FitzGerrold, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Ermentrude Talbot, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Lisle nel 1239, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzGeroldが約1215年にイギリスノーフォルクムンドフォードで生まれた時，父Henry FitzGerroldは42歳，母Ermentrude Talbotは16歳であった。1239年にイギリスでRobert de Lisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzGerold(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 노르폴크 먼드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry FitzGerrold(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude Talbot(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1239년 영국에서 Robert de Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzGerold nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry FitzGerrold, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude Talbot, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Lisle em 1239, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1284, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzGerold родилась около 1215 г. в местности мундфорд, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry FitzGerrold было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude Talbot, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Lisle в 1239 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1284 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzGerold nació aproximadamente 1215, en Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry FitzGerrold, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Ermentrude Talbot, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Robert de Lisle en 1239, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1284, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
